questionHtml:
Choose the correct statement from the following.

  1. HCF is the least common multiple of the given numbers.

  2. HCF of two or more numbers is the highest number which perfectly divides all the given numbers.

  3. HCF is also called the least common divisor.

  4. In prime factorisation method of HCF, the multiples of all the given numbers are listed.
options: HCF is the least common multiple of the given numbers.
HCF of two or more numbers is the highest number which perfectly divides all the given numbers.
HCF is also called the least common divisor.
In prime factorisation method of HCF, the multiples of all the given numbers are listed.
subject: Quant

_source.testSeries: SSC CGL 2022 Chapter wise Quantitative Aptitude
_source.product: Chapter Wise Tests for All SSC Exams : 2026 (EDUQUITY BASED) Exam: SSC
